name: req-to-pr
description: Turn a requirements document into a pull request: plan, implement, and open a PR

steps.prompt: Read any requirements or specification files in the VFS (check /src/, /memory/, /scratch/ for files named requirements*, spec*, README*). Analyze the existing codebase structure in /src/. Write a detailed implementation plan to /scratch/req-to-pr/plan.md covering: files to create, files to modify, implementation order, and success criteria. Do NOT write any /src/ code yet — planning only.

Read the plan at /scratch/req-to-pr/plan.md. Implement ALL the files listed in 'files to create' and make ALL the changes listed in 'files to modify'. Write each file to /src/ as specified in the plan. Emit file_write for each file. Emit progress between major steps. When all files are written, emit a metric with the count of files created.

Read /scratch/req-to-pr/plan.md for context on what was implemented. Create a feature branch named feat/req-to-pr-<timestamp> where <timestamp> is Date.now(). Commit all dirty /src/ files to that branch. Open a pull request with: title summarizing the feature, body with a bullet-list summary of what was implemented (from the plan), and a test plan checklist. Emit the PR URL as a result.
